snippet.title: Baker Hughes CEO Lorenzo Simonelli Talks Earnings | Bloomberg Talks
snippet.description:
Baker Hughes Chairman and CEO Lorenzo Simonelli discusses the company's Q3 earnings beat. Simonelli says he sees positive momentum across its portfolio despite persisting global economic uncertainty. He speaks with Bloomberg's Alix Steel.

snippet.title: Bending the emissions curve
snippet.description:
The planet is rapidly approaching the emissions cliff.

Which solutions will be most effective, both in cost and time, in lowering emissions over the next decade?

CNBC's Stephen Sedgwick is joined by Dolf van den Brink, CEO of Heineken, Shunichi Miyanaga, chairman of the board, Mitsubishi Heavy Industries, Pakistan's Federal Minister for Climate Change Sherry Rehman, Lorenzo Simonelli of Baker Hughes Energy Services and World Economic Forum's Pedro Gomez.

#WEF23 #ClimateChange #Emissions

localized.title: Bending the emissions curve
localized.description:
The planet is rapidly approaching the emissions cliff.

Which solutions will be most effective, both in cost and time, in lowering emissions over the next decade?

CNBC's Stephen Sedgwick is joined by Dolf van den Brink, CEO of Heineken, Shunichi Miyanaga, chairman of the board, Mitsubishi Heavy Industries, Pakistan's Federal Minister for Climate Change Sherry Rehman, Lorenzo Simonelli of Baker Hughes Energy Services and World Economic Forum's Pedro Gomez.

#WEF23 #ClimateChange #Emissions

snippet.title: EGYPS 2023: The world needs to move faster on energy transition
snippet.description: In an exclusive studio interview from EGYPS 2023, Julian Walker sat down with Lorenzo Simonelli, Chairman and CEO of Baker Hughes, to discuss why the world isn’t moving fast enough when it comes to the energy transition but how technology is really changing this. He touched on why he feels Egypt can play an important role in the transition and shared details on the new digital advancements announced at the Baker Hughes Annual Meeting in January 2023.

localized.title: EGYPS 2023: The world needs to move faster on energy transition

snippet.title: In discussion with Lorenzo Simonelli, Chairman, President and CEO at Baker Hughes

snippet.title: Baker Hughes Say Recent Mergers Present Opportunities
snippet.description:
Oilfield service provider Baker Hughes Chairman and CEO Lorenzo Simonelli says recent mergers in the oil sector create opportunities for his company. He says there have been no disruptions due to the war in Israel, but they are monitoring the situation. The company reported third quarter earnings that beat estimates. Simonelli speaks on "Bloomberg Markets."

snippet.title: Flipping the Barrel -EP 095 Lorenzo Simonelli, CEO at Baker Hughes.
snippet.description:

Due to social distancing restrictions- we sat according to standards ft apart.

snippet.title: BakerHughes — Our Values
snippet.description: For over a century, our people have developed the innovations that have helped to advance the oil and gas industry.  Today, we are bringing our expertise to make energy safer, cleaner and more efficient and inventing technologies for a new energy future. We are the new Baker Hughes.

localized.title: BakerHughes — Our Values
localized.description: For over a century, our people have developed the innovations that have helped to advance the oil and gas industry.  Today, we are bringing our expertise to make energy safer, cleaner and more efficient and inventing technologies for a new energy future. We are the new Baker Hughes.

snippet.title: Trade Offs | Baker Hughes - LNG's carbon footprint
snippet.description:
If the energy sector is to transform over the next quarter century, one of the biggest technological shifts will be at the huge services companies which are its day-to-day backbone. From deep sea divers to Texas roughnecks, Baker Hughes is one of the oil and gas industry’s big three global services players. Its CEO, Lorenzo Simonelli, talks to Fidelity’s Ned Salter in our latest Trade Offs.

Listen to the full podcasts here: https://www.fidelity.com.au/insights/investment-articles/trade-offs-baker-hughes-telling-home-truths-about-natural-gas/

#TradeOffs #LNG #BakerHughes #Sustainability #Carbonfootprint

snippet.title: Interview with Kevin Wheeler: ‘AI will be integrated into every recruitment tool’
snippet.description: According to Kevin Wheeler, AI is not just one of the big trends, but the dominant force shaping the future of recruiting and work. ‘ChatGPT or some equivalent is going to be built into every recruitment product out there’, he says in an interview with Recruitment Tech.

snippet.title: Baker Hughes Energy Ideas Generation Program - Adaptronics Interview
snippet.description: Is a high-tech startup, spin-off of the University of Bologna, which produces devices to make logistics more sustainable on Earth and in Space by reinventing the robotic gripping action of objects of any shape, size and material. The startup develops a proprietary thin-film technology that becomes adhesive on command by electrostatics, with a high force density, minimal weight and energy consumption.

The startup develops a proprietary thin-film technology that becomes adhesive on command by electrostatics, with a high force density, minimal weight and energy consumption.

snippet.title: Interview with Zaher Ibrahim, Vice President EMEA at Baker Hughes
snippet.description:
Zaher Ibrahim, Vice President EMEA at Baker Hughes and Executive Committee Member for World Utilities Congress 2023 talks about how the company is focusing on developing new technologies and collaborating with key customers to achieve net zero by 2050.

Hosted by TAQA Group and taking place from 8-10 May 2023, World Utilities Congress will offer direct access to the latest products, innovations, and technological advancements, bringing together global industry leaders to discuss the developments that are redefining the power and water sector.

Register for your free visitor badge to attend the exhibition: bit.ly/3XcUnQl

Book your conference delegate pass today and take advantage of the early bird rates: bit.ly/3Gejih1

snippet.title: Baker Hughes Energy Ideas Generation Program - Resilco Interview
snippet.description: Born in Bergamo in 2019, develops and applies innovative sustainable solutions for the circular economy, deals in particular with the valorisation of industrial waste which today has landfill disposal as its only destination. In particular, the company has developed various patented technologies for the treatment of residues from industrial processes (steel plant slag, fly ashes from waste-to-energy plants, fine powders from cement factories, etc.) with a carbon capture effect.

localized.title: Baker Hughes Energy Ideas Generation Program - Resilco Interview
localized.description: Born in Bergamo in 2019, develops and applies innovative sustainable solutions for the circular economy, deals in particular with the valorisation of industrial waste which today has landfill disposal as its only destination. In particular, the company has developed various patented technologies for the treatment of residues from industrial processes (steel plant slag, fly ashes from waste-to-energy plants, fine powders from cement factories, etc.) with a carbon capture effect.

snippet.title: Together, we can change energy for the better
snippet.description: Together, we must meet the dual challenge of maintaining affordable energy while also meeting ambitious net zero targets. How can we accelerate the energy transition? To find out, click here: https://bit.ly/3eBKmHn to download our feature report 'The coming transition: a blueprint for navigating the next 30 years in the energy industry'.

snippet.title: Machine Health by Baker Hughes
snippet.description:
Our teams at Bently Nevada, a Baker Hughes business, and Augury are helping customers across heavy industries improve the health of their machines. Early adopters, INVISTA, a subsidiary of Koch Industries achieve multi-million-dollar savings months after deploying Machine Health, our latest AI-driven monitoring and diagnostics solution.

Click here to find out more: https://www.bakerhughes.com/bently-nevada/system-1-software/machine-health

snippet.title: Baker Hughes Knowledge Services - VR Training
snippet.description:
A disrupting learning solution through fully immersive and interactive training scenarios designed to increase workforce efficiency, optimize timely detection and to deliver high-risk training safely and effectively. VR Training works in synergy with existing training services extending their effectiveness and with a tremendous level of flexibility in creating your tailor-made solution. Baker Hughes trainings are part of the Knowledge Services suites.

#energy #bakerhughes #energytechnology #energytransition #hse #virtualreality

snippet.title: Baker Hughes Gas Turbine Offshore Packages—from 20 to 40 MW
snippet.description: Baker Hughes in 50 years of offshore experience, enhanced gas turbine packages injecting technologies to minimize footprint (-22%) and weight (-20%), maximize availability and reliability. Our solutions are compact, light and durable, with high quality and flexibility.
